visual_description: A man in a blue polo shirt and light pants sits on a brown couch, gesturing with his hands while looking toward another person seated beside him. The second person, wearing a red shirt, is partially visible and also gesturing as they interact. In the background, other individuals are standing or seated, and a green pole and various items on shelves are visible in the room.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate speed, speaking in a neutral tone without any noticeable inflection.
